ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subreddits" (
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subreddit */,
  "subreddit_name" TEXT /* Name of the subreddit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subreddit */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the subreddit was created */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator responsible for the subreddit */,
  "rules" TEXT /* Rules of the subreddit */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the subreddit */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subreddit is archived */,
  "is_nsfw" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subreddit is marked as NSFW */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity in the subreddit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subreddit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subreddit where the post is posted */,
  "post_title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "post_content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the post (upvotes - downvotes) */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is sticky */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is locked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the post */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is deleted */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_subreddit_id FOREIGN KEY ("subreddit_id") REFERENCES subreddits ("subreddit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post where the comment is posted */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if any) */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the comment (upvotes - downvotes) */,
  "unix_timestamp" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp of the comment creation */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is deleted */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been edited */,
  "edit_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is reported */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of reports for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "karma_score" INTEGER /* Overall karma score of the user */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for banning the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "subreddit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subreddit the moderator manages */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (upvote or downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who voted */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (upvote or downvote) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_votes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., post, comment, vote) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "is_hidden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity is hidden */,
  "activity_score" INTEGER /* Score of the activity (e.g., upvotes, downvotes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., remove post, ban user) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "is_reversed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action has been reversed */,
  "reversal_date" TEXT /* Date the action was reversed */,
  "reversal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for reversing the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the comment (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categorization" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being categorized */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is custom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categorization_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
